data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Delivery status tracking', which is explicitly listed in the use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of delivery status tracking. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the SMS reminder system but do not address this specific requirement, indicating a clear gap in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation or functionality of delivery status tracking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
